problems_encountered.description: Cannot execute project-membership-get because project-membership-list failed with 403 permission error. No valid membership ID available to test the get operation.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to missing dependency. The prerequisite project-membership-list operation failed with permission denied error.
execution_notes: Unable to obtain a valid membership ID from project-membership-list due to 403 error. The authenticated user lacks permissions to list or manage project memberships. This tool requires a membership ID which cannot be obtained without list permissions.
